en: Ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho no! Steam clam!
Protein water! Man it! Steam ham!
I hope you're prepared for steam ham! Gay guys!
Their protein is growing! Steam clam!
I hope you go purchase fast food! Steam ham! Disgusting!
This plant's a lot for one share! Steam clam!
ko: 찜 조개 찜 조개 찜 조개

en: I hope you go hopefully double it! Steam ham!
For my business talkers! I was just at this trendy light cab!
Care to join me? Why is there smoke coming out of your oven, Steam ham?
ko: 나와 함께할 사람이 여기 있어, 왜 네 오븐에서 연기가 나고 있어? 더 찜해, 나는 연기가 필요해

en: I'm the one that needs some smoke! I-I-It's steam!
Steam from the steam clam! Burn everything! Steam clam!
ko: 찜 조개 찜 조개 찜 조개
찜 조개 찜 조개 찜 조개
